---
title: "Spring Week 4"
---

## Materials

📕 [Class slides]({{< var spring-week4-class-slides >}})

📗 [Unit Testing for Web Apps Workshop - 
Sam Shanny-Csik]({{< var unit-testing-for-web-apps-slides >}})

💭 [In-class team reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411B >}})

📖 [Capstone guidelines]({{< var capstone-guidelines >}})

## Schedule

12:30 - ~1:45: Unit Testing Web Apps Workshop - Sam Shanny-Csik

~1:45 - 2:00: Break

2:00 - 2:10: Questions, Check-in, & Upcoming assignments

2:10 - 3:20: Independent co-working & meetings with teams

3:20 - 3:30: Team reflections



## Upcoming deadlines

{{< include _spring_deadlines_tables.qmd >}}

<div id="table-week4-7"></div>

## To do by next week

### 1. 🗂 Update your GitHub org and repositories
**Due when?** Update your organization by next class {{< var spring-week5-class-date >}}. We will use this for a peer-review activity.

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

1. Use [this checklist]({{< var organization-repository-checklist >}}) to update and clean your GitHub organization, repositories, and files by next class.

2. Make sure your code and repositories are public so they can be reviewed next week.

**Next class, we’ll have a round of in-class peer feedback for to review your GitHub files.**

</details>

<br>

### 2. 📝 Update your Techincal Documentation

If you have already received feedback from your advisor:

- discuss feedback with your team
- start working on updating your draft
- contact advisors or clients for clarification and reply to comments within the document as needed. Remember to always do your research and discuss with your team first!
